steps.text: There are 5 stations total. If \(x\) stations use Experiment A (6 tsp each), then \(5 - x\) stations use Experiment B (4 tsp each).

Evaluate all choices:
  • A and B are not shown as complete expressions in the problem — eliminated.
  • C: \(2x + 20\) — matches the simplified expression exactly. That matches choice C — C is correct.
  • D: \(10x + 20\) — would only be correct if Experiment B required 0 tsp and Experiment A required 10 tsp; incorrect. Eliminated.
